bio_short: With over 35 years of experience, CEO of Adrian Day Asset Management, publishes Global Analyst.
bio_long: Adrian Day is Chairman and CEO of Adrian Day Asset Management, a registered Investment Advisory firm. He is also editor-in-chief of Global Analyst, an e-mail newsletter. With over 35 years of experience, Adrian Day curates specific buy and sell recommendations with a track record boasting an average 87.5% return for all closed positions.
